rooms.desc: The central town square. A cool mountain river rushes past a stone fountain here.
The Rusty Flagon. A rowdy tavern complete with comfortable beds, heavy oak chairs, and a baking oven.
The quiet upper floor of the tavern. Soft straw beds line the walls under a wooden ceiling.
Sanctuary of Light. A grand cathedral housing the resplendent Altar of Sol. The air is thick with holy incense.
The town guard barracks. Weapon racks, shield braces, and training dummies line the stone walls.
The high watchtower overlooking the shire. Banners flutter loudly in the strong wind.
The iron-barred dungeon. It is bleak, secure, and inescapable. Clangs of chains echo through the cells.
A tilled farming field. Fertile soil stretches out in neat furrows under the open sky.
A dense apple orchard. Sweet-smelling blossoms hang low from thick, sturdy branches.
A towering wooden windmill. Large stone gears creak endlessly as they grind wheat into flour.
The dark, excavated entrance to an abandoned mine.
